reviewer.evidencePolicy: Only mark the deterministic refresh-plan packet field contract satisfied; do not infer skill-host branch selection proof.

claimUpdates.whyThisLayer: The claim names deterministic refresh-plan output fields and state-transition facts, which should be covered by runtime packet tests.
claimUpdates.evidenceStatusReason: Verified by focused runtime tests: refresh-plan output records baseline and target commits, target policy, working-tree policy, changed source and carried-forward counts, stale evidence reasons, and does not update the saved claim map.
claimUpdates.nextAction: Keep refresh-plan packet tests current when changing prior-claim-state, stale-evidence, or working-tree policy fields.
